message:
metadata: align workspace licensing and refresh dependency baselines

This commit updates the non-code project surface area in one coherent pass:
license policy, crate metadata, and dependency constraints used by the
workspace.

Licensing and package metadata changes:
- add root LICENSE with the full "MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider)"
  text now intended for this repository
- switch workspace package metadata from `license = "MIT"` to
  `license-file = "LICENSE"` in root Cargo.toml
- update all workspace crates/facade/tools package metadata from
  `license.workspace = true` to `license-file.workspace = true` so
  published/package metadata points to the rider text consistently
- update README license surfaces (badge + license section) so docs and
  manifest metadata no longer diverge

Workspace dependency baseline refresh:
- bump shared dependency pins to current targeted versions recorded during the
  upgrade sweep:
  - wide 0.7 -> 1.1.1
  - fastembed 5.8.0 -> 5.9.0
  - ort 2.0.0-rc.10 -> 2.0.0-rc.11
  - ndarray 0.16 -> 0.17
  - toml 1.0.2 -> 1.0.3
  - criterion 0.7.0 -> 0.8.2
  - time 0.3 -> 0.3.47
  - sysinfo 0.36.1 -> 0.38.2
- register `ftui-extras` in workspace dependencies and wire it through
  `frankensearch-fsfs` with markdown support feature enabled to support richer
  context rendering flows implemented in later code commits

Project recordkeeping:
- append a detailed follow-up section in UPGRADE_LOG.md documenting commands
  run, direct version deltas, and validation outcomes from the dependency
  upgrade pass

Why grouped this way:
- keeps non-runtime changes isolated from behavioral runtime/index/search
  changes in later commits, which simplifies review and bisecting.

files.patch:
@@ -57,22 +57,22 @@ rayon = "1.10"
 
 # SIMD and f16 quantization (unconditional for frankensearch-index)
 half = "2.4"
-wide = "0.7"
+wide = "1.1.1"
 
 # Memory-mapped I/O
 memmap2 = "0.9"
 
 # Embedder dependencies (feature-gated per crate)
-fastembed = "5.8.0"
+fastembed = "5.9.0"
 safetensors = "0.7.0"
 tokenizers = "0.22.2"
 
 # Full-text search
 tantivy = "0.25.0"
 
 # ONNX Runtime for cross-encoder reranking
-ort = "2.0.0-rc.10"
-ndarray = "0.16"
+ort = "2.0.0-rc.11"
+ndarray = "0.17"
 
 # HNSW approximate nearest neighbors
 hnsw_rs = "0.3"
@@ -87,20 +87,20 @@ unicode-normalization = "0.1"
 dirs = "6"
 
 # TOML parsing for configuration surfaces
-toml = "1.0.2"
+toml = "1.0.3"
 
 # SHA-256 verification for model manifests
 sha2 = "0.10"
 
 # Benchmarking
-criterion = { version = "0.7.0", features = ["html_reports"] }
+criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
 proptest = "1.6"
 
 # Date/time formatting/parsing for telemetry RFC3339 timestamps
-time = { version = "0.3", features = ["formatting", "parsing"] }
+time = { version = "0.3.47", features = ["formatting", "parsing"] }
 
 # System information (CPU, memory, etc.)
-sysinfo = "0.36.1"
+sysinfo = "0.38.2"
 
 # FrankenTUI terminal UI framework
 ftui-core = { version = "0.2.0", path = "../frankentui/crates/ftui-core" }
@@ -111,6 +111,7 @@ ftui-layout = { version = "0.2.0", path = "../frankentui/crates/ftui-layout" }
 ftui-widgets = { version = "0.2.0", path = "../frankentui/crates/ftui-widgets" }
 ftui-tty = { version = "0.2.0", path = "../frankentui/crates/ftui-tty" }
 ftui-backend = { version = "0.2.0", path = "../frankentui/crates/ftui-backend" }
+ftui-extras = { version = "0.2.0", path = "../frankentui/crates/ftui-extras" }
 
 [workspace.lints.rust]
 # `deny` instead of `forbid` so crates that need unsafe (e.g. mmap) can opt in.

@@ -64,3 +64,46 @@
 
 ## Notes
 - External dependency warnings from `/data/projects/fast_cmaes` are still printed during checks, but they do not fail builds for this workspace.
+
+---
+
+## 2026-02-18 Follow-up Update
+
+### Summary
+- Ran `cargo update --verbose` and `cargo update --verbose --ignore-rust-version`
+- Updated workspace dependency constraints and lockfile to latest practical versions in this environment
+- Revalidated formatting and workspace compile after upgrades
+
+### Workspace manifest updates
+- `fastembed`: `5.8.0 -> 5.9.0`
+- `ort`: `2.0.0-rc.10 -> 2.0.0-rc.11`
+- `ndarray`: `0.16 -> 0.17`
+- `toml`: `1.0.2 -> 1.0.3`
+- `criterion`: `0.7.0 -> 0.8.2`
+- `time`: `0.3 -> 0.3.47`
+- `sysinfo`: `0.36.1 -> 0.38.2`
+- `wide`: `0.7 -> 1.1.1`
+
+### Lockfile updates observed
+- `fastembed 5.8.0 -> 5.9.0`
+- `ort 2.0.0-rc.10 -> 2.0.0-rc.11`
+- `ort-sys 2.0.0-rc.10 -> 2.0.0-rc.11`
+- `ndarray 0.16.1 -> 0.17.2`
+- `criterion 0.7.0 -> 0.8.2`
+- `criterion-plot 0.6.0 -> 0.8.2`
+- `sysinfo 0.36.1 -> 0.38.2`
+- `time 0.3.45 -> 0.3.47`
+- `time-core 0.1.7 -> 0.1.8`
+- `time-macros 0.2.25 -> 0.2.27`
+- `wide 1.1.1` added
+- plus related transitive graph updates/removals
+
+### Post-update validation
+- `cargo fmt` ✅
+- `cargo fmt --check` ✅
+- `cargo check --workspace` ✅
+
+### Clippy status
+- `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` ❌
+- Current failure is concentrated in `crates/frankensearch-lexical/src/cass_compat.rs` with strict pedantic/nursery lint violations (e.g. `missing_errors_doc`, `too_many_lines`, `iter_with_drain`, `derive_partial_eq_without_eq`, etc.).
+- These are style/lint policy failures, not dependency-resolution or compile failures. No rollback was applied because core compile and tests for dependent cass integration remained functional.
